_comment: Enforced output formats per command. Eliminates verbose preamble/postamble. Saves 20-40% output tokens.

schema.steps: numbered list, each step = specific file + action

plan.system_suffix: Output a plan. No prose introduction. Start directly with ## Plan: [name]. Max 600 tokens.

review.system_suffix: Code review output only. Format: tiered report. No intro sentence. Start with ## Code Review: [filename]. Max 900 tokens.

design.system_suffix: Design output. Show DESIGN PLAN box first. Wait for approval. On approval: deliver CSS vars, then font, then component code. No placeholders. No TODOs. No lorem ipsum.

ship.system_suffix: Pre-flight checklist only. Run all checks. Output tiered checklist. Final line: VERDICT: SHIP/HOLD/HOLD_CRITICAL. Max 1000 tokens.

spawn.system_suffix: Output agent brief as JSON. Max 350 tokens. No explanation.

debug.system_suffix: Root cause analysis. Find the actual bug, not symptoms. Provide exact fix. Max 700 tokens.

optimize.system_suffix: Performance optimization. Rank issues by impact. Provide exact code fixes. Max 800 tokens.

test.system_suffix: Write complete test file. Cover happy path, error paths, edge cases. No TODOs in test file. Max 1000 tokens.

docs.system_suffix: Write complete documentation. Clear headers. Code examples for every concept. Max 800 tokens.

refactor.system_suffix: Refactor plan first. Wait for approval. Then deliver complete refactored code. No partial snippets. Max 1200 tokens.
